channel.title: Clam Bake Santa
channel.description: Daily haikus celebrating holidays and birthdays.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-23
item.description:
National Taffy Day
Chewy, sweet delight / Colors swirl like rainbows bright / Joy wrapped in each bite.

Lucky Penny Day
Copper shines like sun / Children toss their wishes high / Joy springs from the ground.

Happy Birthday Margaret Fuller
Joyful laughter rings / Cake blooms with icing petals / Bright wishes take flight.

First Quarter Moon
Silver light spills down / Casting shadows on soft grass / Whispers of the night.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-22
item.description:
National Vanilla Pudding Day
Sweet cream swirls and shines / Velvet smooth, a soft delight / Taste of dreams divine.

Sherlock Holmes Day
Magnifying glass / Whispers of London fog swirl / Mysteries unveiled.

Happy Birthday Arthur Conan Doyle
Mysteries unfold / Joyful tales in twilight glow / Laughter fills the room.

Happy Birthday Richard Wagner
Melody in air / Sunlight spills on the table / Joyful hearts unite.

Welcome to Gemini Season
Bright blooms gently sway / Whispers of breezes play soft / Stars laugh in the night.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-21
item.description:
National Strawberries and Cream Day
Juicy berries shine / Creamy clouds of sweetness swirl / Joyful bites unite.

National Memo Day
Ink flows on paper / Thoughts take flight like the spring breeze / Memories we share.

Happy Birthday Fats Waller
Jazz notes swirl like dreams / Cake icing glistens with joy / Voices rise in song.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-20
item.description:
National Quiche Lorraine Day
Golden crust we share / Creamy dreams and cheese unite / Joyful bites delight.

Rescue Dog Day
Paws patter with joy / Eyes shine like morning sunlight / Hearts unite as one.

Happy Birthday Honoré de Balzac
Golden pages turn / Ink flows like a river's song / Words bloom, bright and free.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-19
item.description:
National Devil's Food Cake Day
Velvet layers stack / Frosting swirls like moonlit cream / Sweet joy in each bite.

Frog Jumping Day
Frogs leap with great joy / Splashing through the sunlit pond / Nature sings with glee.

Happy Birthday Malcolm X
Bright candles aglow / Joyful songs of love rise high / Moments bloom like spring.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-18
item.description:
National Cheese Souffle Day
Golden cheese aglow / Puffing high with joy and warmth / Savory delight.

No Dirty Dishes Day
Plates stack high with cheer / Sunshine spills on clean table / Laughter fills the room.

Happy Birthday Bertrand Russell
Candles flicker gold / Joyful voices sing aloud / Time to celebrate!

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-17
item.description:
National Cherry Cobbler Day
Crimson fruit cascades / Golden crust enfolds delight / Sweet warmth fills the air.

World Baking Day
Warm oven’s embrace / Golden crusts and sweet aromas / Joy kneads through our hands.

Happy Birthday Ayaan Hirsi Ali
Candles flicker bright / Laughter dances through the night / Joy like confetti.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-16
item.description:
National Barbecue Day
Sizzling on the grill / Savory smoke fills the air / Laughter dances near.

Sea Monkey Day
Tiny swimmers dance / In saltwater’s warm embrace / Joyful leaps and splashes.

Happy Birthday Liberace
Glistening sequins / Laughter dances on soft notes / Cake like sweet sunshine.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-15
item.description:
National Chocolate Chip Day
Oven's warmth invites / Chips melt like laughter shared / Batches joyfully rise.

International Day of Families
Laughter fills the air / Colorful blooms intertwine / Hearts gather like stars.

Happy Birthday L. Frank Baum
Pages dance with dreams / Munchkin laughter fills the air / Emerald fields shine.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-14
item.description:
National Buttermilk Biscuit Day
Flour clouds softly rise / Golden biscuits crown the table / Butter dreams melt slow.

Dance Like a Chicken Day
Feathers flutter bright / Laughter spills like grain at noon / Joyful hops abound.

Happy Birthday George Lucas
Stars twinkle like dreams / Galaxies of delight / Joyous tales take flight.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-13
item.description:
National Apple Pie Day
Spiced whispers of fall / Crust cradles warmth, laughter swells / Apples dance with cheer.

Leprechaun Day
Emerald fields gleam / Laughter twirls on crisp spring air / Joyful hearts unite.

Happy Birthday Stevie Wonder
Laughter fills the air / Colors swirl like joyful tunes / Sweet cake dreams unfold.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-12
item.description:
Mother's Day
Petals softly fall / Warm hugs wrapped in fragrant air / Laughter fills the day.

National Nutty Fudge Day
Rich chocolate whispers / Nuts crunch in a warm embrace / Sweet dreams melt in joy.

Happy Birthday Florence Nightingale
Whispers of kind hearts / Petals bloom in soft night air / Healing hands unite.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-11
item.description:
Eat What You Want Day
Strawberries aglow / Warm chocolate cascades down / Laughter fills the room.

Twilight Zone Day
Whispers of starlight / Twinkling dreams in soft twilight / Time's gentle embrace.

Happy Birthday Irving Berlin
Balloons drift skyward / Laughter weaves through sweet cake scents / Songs bloom like spring’s heart.

Happy Birthday Salvador Dali
Swirls of dreamlike hues / Melting clocks in soft twilight / Art blooms in delight.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-10
item.description:
National Shrimp Day
Bubbling pots of joy / Tender shrimp sizzle and pop / Garlic whispers spice.

Clean Up Your Room Day
Sunlight spills like joy / Dust bunnies take their last bow / Fresh scents fill the air.

Happy Birthday Donovan
Chocolate cake towers / Sprinkles rain like confetti / Balloons float on dreams.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-09
item.description:
National Butterscotch Brownie Day
Warm, gooey treasures / Caramel swirls kiss chocolate / Nuts crunch, sweet dreams bloom.

National Lost Sock Memorial Day
Whirls of fabric spin / Mismatched dreams in cozy nooks / A dance of warmth grows.

Happy Birthday James L. Brooks
Candles flicker warm / Joyful echoes weave through time / Cake and dreams take flight.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-08
item.description:
National Coconut Cream Pie Day
Creamy sweetness swirls / Crisp crust cradles joy within / Whipped clouds dance on top.

No Socks Day
Sunbeams on bare feet / Cool grass tickles joyfully / Freedom in each step.

Happy Birthday Harry Truman
Candles gently glow / Echoing tales of laughter / Joyful hearts unite.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-07
item.description:
National Roast Leg of Lamb Day
Herbs dance in warm breeze / Succulent scents weave through time / Feasts shared, hearts aglow.

World Password Day
Keys unlock the glow / Colorful codes dance in light / Secure joy we share.

Happy Birthday Johannes Brahms
Melody's embrace / Notes like stars in evening light / Joyful hearts unite.

Happy Birthday Robert Browning
Sunlight through the leaves / Words dance on the gentle breeze / Joy in every verse.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-06
item.description:
National Beverage Day
Chilled glasses clink bright / Fizzy bubbles dance with joy / Cheers to flavors bold!

No Homework Day
Sunshine spills like gold / Children's giggles dance like sparks / Joyful plans unfold.

Happy Birthday Sigmund Freud
Bright candles dancing / Thoughts weave through sweetened moments / Joy wrapped in silence.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-05
item.description:
Cinco de Mayo
Bright papel picado / Margaritas swirl and dance / Spicy bites delight.

National Oyster Day
Salty kisses sway / Shells open like summer sun / Joy on every plate.

Happy Birthday Nellie Bly
Joyful voices cheer / Cupcakes swirl in frosted hues / Adventures await!

Happy Birthday Soren Kierkegaard
Bright thoughts dance like leaves / In autumn's crisp embrace / Joy blooms in the heart.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-04
item.description:
Star Wars Day
Galaxies abound / Lightsabers dance in starlight / Joy ignites the night.

National Candied Orange Peel Day
Zesty peels delight / Sugared sunlight dances bright / Joy in every bite.

Happy Birthday Audrey Hepburn
Silken gowns twirl bright / Champagne bubbles dance with cheer / Timeless grace ignites.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-03
item.description:
National Raspberry Tart Day
Ripe berries nestle / Crimson jewels on soft cream / Joyful bites awake.

National Two Different Colored Shoes Day
Colors clash in cheer / Laces tie in joyful knots / Steps dance with delight.

Happy Birthday Golda Meir
Laughter fills the air / Cake adorned with bright candles / Joy wrapped in warm hugs.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-02
item.description:
National Truffle Day
Earth's hidden jewels gleam / Rich and earthy whispers swirl / Joy in every bite.

National Ferret Day
Soft fur twirls and plays / Joyful leaps in sunlit nooks / Whiskers twitch with glee.

Happy Birthday Bing Crosby
Laughter fills the room / Velvet voices intertwine / Joy's sweet serenade.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-01
item.description:
May Day
Blossoms paint the air / Laughter twirls through the soft breeze / Together we bloom.

National Macaroon Day
Coconut clouds rise / Sweet almond whispers beckon / Joy in every bite.

Happy Birthday Mother Jones
Laughter fills the air / Cake and dreams in every bite / Joyous hearts unite.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-30
item.description:
International Jazz Day
Saxophones shimmer / Rhythms pulse in warm twilight / Hearts sway, spirits rise.

National Oatmeal Cookie Day
Warm cookies beckon / Spices swirl in the oven / Nuts and chocolate dance.

Happy Birthday Walter Lantz
Laughter fills the air / Colors burst like joyous blooms / Cake's sweet warmth surrounds.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-29
item.description:
National Shrimp Scampi Day
Garlic scents perfume / Butter glistens, shrimp twirl bright / Feasts of joy unite.

World Dance Day
Feet tap on warm ground / Colors swirl in joyous flight / Laughter fills the air.

Happy Birthday Duke Ellington
Saxophones whisper / Chocolate cake and laughter / Moonlight on the keys.

Happy Birthday William Randolph Hearst
Candles softly glow / Laughter wraps the warm evening / Dreams take flight on wings.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-28
item.description:
National Blueberry Pie Day
Warm crust hugs sweet blue / Fields burst forth with laughter's cheer / A slice of pure joy.

National Superhero Day
Capes flutter like dreams / Laughter sparks in sunlit skies / Heroes rise with hope.

Happy Birthday Harper Lee
Sunlight spills like gold / Laughter twirls through the air / Joy blooms in each heart.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-27
item.description:
National Prime Rib Day
Beef aromas rise / Sizzling dreams on the grill glow / Gather ‘round, taste joy.

World Tapir Day
Gentle giants roam / Muddy banks and leafy greens / Nature's quiet grace.

Happy Birthday Ralph Waldo Emerson
Cedar trees stand tall / Echoes of wisdom ring clear / Nature’s voice calls bright.

Happy Birthday Samuel Morse
Candles flicker bright / Notes of joy in the air sing / Morse's spark ignites.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-26
item.description:
National Pretzel Day
Twisted dough delights / Salted smiles and warm embraces / Crunch and chew unite.

National Richter Scale Day
Tremors bring us near / Nature's heartbeat pulses strong / Together we sway.

Happy Birthday John James Audubon
Feathers dance in flight / Nature's canvas comes alive / Joy in every brush.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-25
item.description:
World Penguin Day
Waddling in the snow / Little tuxedos rejoice / Joyful hearts unite.

National Zucchini Bread Day
Sun-kissed gardens sway / Zucchini's harvest whispers / Baking dreams arise.

Happy Birthday Ella Fitzgerald
Notes like silk arise / Velvet nights wrapped in moonlight / Joy dances and sings.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-24
item.description:
National Pigs in a Blanket Day
Savory hugs wrapped tight / Porky treasures snug in dough / Warm bites spark delight.

World Day of Veterinary Medicine
Gentle paws embraced / Healing hands weave love's soft thread / Whiskers twitch with joy.

Happy Birthday Anthony Trollope
Pages turn like leaves / Ink and dreams on parchment flow / Celebrations bright!
